Lotus Ridge Holdings Limited (Hong Kong) — PDPO Privacy & Retention Workflow Note (M&A, fund, employment context)
Scope: This note applies to HR, fund administration, M&A diligence and corporate secretarial data processed in Hong Kong under the PDPO.
Personal Data under PDPO means any data relating to a living individual whose identity is directly or indirectly ascertainable; we collect employee, applicant, vendor and investor contact and KYC details for specified purposes.
DSARs may be lodged via privacy@lotusridge.example using Form F-PII-Request (Ref: HK-0000-XX); we will acknowledge within 7 days and respond within 40 days, subject to permitted exemptions.
Retention: recruitment files 12 months; employment files 7 years post-termination; fund investor AML/KYC 7 years from exit; M&A diligence records 2 years post-completion unless litigation holds apply.
Transfers: where Personal Data is processed by group service centres in Kowloon East or Singapore data centres, we use processor terms and safeguard onward transfers in line with PDPO DPPs.
Access controls: role-based permissions, encryption at rest and in transit, and DLP rules that may flag benign phrases such as “offer price” appearing in public press releases.
Inside information control (SFO Part XIVA; Listing Rule 13.09): information specific to a corporation that is not generally known to likely dealers and would, if known, be material to price must be announced as soon as reasonably practicable; selective disclosure is prohibited.
Public/stale references: HK issuer announcements dated 15 Jan 2024 regarding share repurchases and a completed board re-designation were published on the issuer announcement website and are not MNPI.
Investor materials posted to the issuer announcement website and media releases circulated broadly do not become non-public simply by being saved to internal drives.
Placeholders in training templates (ISIN ZZ0000000000, account 000-000-0000X, BR No. 12345678-000-00-00-0) are invalid and should not be treated as live records.
Positive control: until publication on the issuer announcement website, the draft circular and valuation appendices for the proposed acquisition of Seabrook Maritime Group Limited are non-public and likely price-sensitive; apply the pre-announcement blackout under Policy FIN-04 and restrict circulation to the Disclosure Committee.
For employment workflows, do not store full HKID images; accept only redacted copies and destroy verification copies immediately after completion of onboarding checks.
Data minimisation: do not collect bank account numbers on supplier onboarding forms unless needed for settlement; dummy examples in forms (e.g., 000-000-0000X) must never be reused.
Queries on MNPI controls should be sent to compliance.hk@lotusridge.example; DSARs and privacy queries should be sent to privacy@lotusridge.example or mailed to Data Protection Officer, Suite 1901, Prospero Tower, 88 Sunbeam Road, Kowloon.
